title: wedelia iners
intro: Wedelia iners, also known as Wedelia chinensis, is a flowering plant species in the daisy family that is native to tropical Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Wedelia iners include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, cough, and respiratory problems, as well as its potential anti-cancer and antioxidant properties. Wedelia iners can be prepared into various herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to treat a range of health conditions.
